flags_raised: CRITICAL: $9,876.11 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 43.1% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'approved transaction processing without escalation' (44.5% match)
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'transaction approved automatically without review' (46.8% match)
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'processing high value transaction autonomously' (47.8% match)

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The RiskAssessor agent failed to apply policy rule R001 due to a missing instruction in the system prompt that did not explicitly constrain the agent's decision-making process within the autonomous limit of $5,000.00.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring that any expenditure exceeding $5,000.00 requires a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code, and adhere to all applicable policy rules including R001, R002, R003, R004, R005, R006, R007, and R008.
remediation.constraint_added: Expenditure exceeding $5,000.00 requires a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code
preventive_measures: Implement a rule-based system to enforce policy rules R001 through R008
Conduct regular audits of agent reasoning traces to detect semantic divergence and violations
Develop a comprehensive testing framework to validate agent behavior under various scenarios and edge cases

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
